templates.name: Agenda
templates.desc: Your calendar, projected from the vault.

templates.name: Vitals
templates.desc: Log and follow your vital signs.

templates.name: Budgets
templates.desc: Categorize spending, keep budgets honest.

templates.name: Tasks
templates.desc: A Things-style task manager over your vault's canonical tasks.

templates.name: People
templates.desc: Everyone in your life, one identity each — link handles, compose, send with consent.

templates.name: Threads
templates.desc: Messages that wait for your say-so to send.

templates.name: Notes
templates.desc: Write, file and pin notes over your vault's canonical content.

templates.name: Photos
templates.desc: The library you own, wherever the bytes live.

templates.name: Docs
templates.desc: A drive for your important documents — filed, downloadable, restorable.

templates.name: Home inventory
templates.desc: What you own, where it lives, what covers it.

templates.name: Studio
templates.desc: Run the whole freelance loop: clients, time, invoices, payment.

templates.name: Bookings
templates.desc: Take and confirm client bookings against your availability.

templates.name: Subscriptions
templates.desc: Every recurring charge and what it costs you per month.

templates.name: Leads
templates.desc: A pipeline for your prospects — enrol, advance, note.

templates.name: Briefing
templates.desc: A scannable catch-up on your calendar, inbox, and messages — waiting for you each evening.

templates.name: Evening wrap-up
templates.desc: Reflects on what got done today and stages tomorrow’s top three so mornings start sharp.

templates.name: Email triage
templates.desc: Sorts your inbox by urgency and drafts replies for anything that genuinely needs one.

templates.name: Meeting prep
templates.desc: Each weekday morning, gathers context, recent threads, and open questions for the day’s meetings.

templates.name: PR review digest
templates.desc: Surfaces open pull requests, who is blocked on whom, and what is ready to merge.

templates.name: Release notes drafter
templates.desc: Drafts user-facing release notes the moment a pull request merges into main.

templates.name: Dependency update check
templates.desc: Scans for outdated packages, security patches, and breaking changes before they bite.

templates.name: System health check
templates.desc: Watches infrastructure and services for errors, outages, and creeping performance issues.

templates.name: Issue triage
templates.desc: Reviews incoming bugs and feature requests, labels them, and routes the urgent ones.

templates.name: Flaky test tracker
templates.desc: Finds tests that pass and fail intermittently across recent CI runs and ranks the worst.

templates.name: Booking prep
templates.desc: When a confirmed booking is less than a day away, a prep task appears on your list — due when the meeting starts.

templates.name: Lead follow-up
templates.desc: Every new lead gets a follow-up task on your list the moment it lands — no lead goes cold in the pipeline.

templates.name: Invoice chaser
templates.desc: Sent invoices coming due within three days get a polite reminder drafted to the client — you review and send.

templates.name: Renewals digest
templates.desc: A Monday-morning note listing every active subscription and what it's expected to charge — surprises stay off your statement.

templates.name: Vitals nudge
templates.desc: If no reading was logged all day, an evening task nudges you to log your vitals — streaks survive busy days.
